## Definition of Done (ENGINEERING-PROTOCOL §5)
- [ ] BA / DEV / QA / TEST-PLAN complete & reviewed
- [ ] SOLID · hexagonal · **Wrapper Rule** · complexity documented (DEV.md)
- [ ] Unit + integration + e2e (+ AI eval for AI slices) green; coverage ≥ 90% new code
- [ ] typecheck + lint + import-boundary green
- [ ] **Visual review**: light + dark screenshots attached; snapshot committed
- [ ] Docs / README / CHANGELOG updated; ADRs filed
